mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (buyer_id, machinery_id, owner_id, address_id, rent_days, lease_start_time, lease_end_time, total_amount, deposit_amount, remark, status, tracking_no, create_time) VALUES (#{buyerId}, #{machineryId}, #{ownerId}, #{addressId}, #{rentDays}, #{leaseStartTime}, #{leaseEndTime}, #{totalAmount}, #{depositAmount}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{trackingNo}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT o.tracking_no AS trackingNo, o.status AS status, o.lease_start_time AS leaseStartTime, o.rent_days AS rentDays, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, m.name AS machineName, m.images AS machineImage, ub.username AS buyerName, uo.username AS ownerName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN machinery m ON o.machinery_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN users uo ON o.owner_id = uo.id
o.buyer_id = #{userId}
o.owner_id = #{userId}
AND o.status = 0
AND o.status = 1
AND o.status = 2
AND o.status = 3
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
